message:
Running command: # There's a 'wrapper_run' - that's probably the first test run. 
# Without a 'latest' symlink, librelane --last-run picks the most recent run dir.
# The validation errors reference 8afc8346 (OLD PDK hash) - this comes from re-resolving config.json
# on a PDK that used to resolve to that hash. But the PDK has CHANGED.
# The issue: librelane re-resolves config.json afresh on each invocation.
# config.json has: --pdk sky130A and the PDK at /nc/pdk is NOW version 0fe599b2
# BUT the SYNTH_MUX_MAP and other PDK-internal paths come from the PDK resolution.
# The librelane config.json itself doesn't have explicit PDK internal paths - those are 
# resolved from the PDK. So the 8afc8346 error means the PREVIOUS resolved.json is 
# being loaded and checked, NOT re-resolved.
# 
# WAIT - the errors mention VERILOG_FILES[32] = NC_XIP/v1.6.0 which is our config.json value!
# But we already updated config.json to v1.7.0. Let's verify config.json is really updated.
grep "NC_XIP" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/config.json | head -3

#

grep "NC_XIP" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/config.json | head -3"}
function.name: execute_bash

args.command:
# There's a 'wrapper_run' - that's probably the first test run. 
# Without a 'latest' symlink, librelane --last-run picks the most recent run dir.
# The validation errors reference 8afc8346 (OLD PDK hash) - this comes from re-resolving config.json
# on a PDK that used to resolve to that hash. But the PDK has CHANGED.
# The issue: librelane re-resolves config.json afresh on each invocation.
# config.json has: --pdk sky130A and the PDK at /nc/pdk is NOW version 0fe599b2
# BUT the SYNTH_MUX_MAP and other PDK-internal paths come from the PDK resolution.
# The librelane config.json itself doesn't have explicit PDK internal paths - those are 
# resolved from the PDK. So the 8afc8346 error means the PREVIOUS resolved.json is 
# being loaded and checked, NOT re-resolved.
# 
# WAIT - the errors mention VERILOG_FILES[32] = NC_XIP/v1.6.0 which is our config.json value!
# But we already updated config.json to v1.7.0. Let's verify config.json is really updated.
grep "NC_XIP" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/config.json | head -3
